theme: E4 DECADAL CLOSE (cycle-10 / O5). E4 is NOT an RLP decadal — it closes on the 4-lens Network-Legibility self-assessment + the quality gates. Per the operator gate: re-confirm (a SECOND independent 4-lens Workflow on the post-fix surfaces) -> close (AAR + ADR-033 ratify + STATE/STR cascade) -> deploy (the bundled E4 ship to adna.network, on the current test-account token).
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; honest topology (no fabricated edges; generator/data byte-identical at the close); <=2 fighting colors; motion unchanged; writing-guidelines AVOID honored; a11y both modes via the permanent gate-4 loop.
operator_scope: AskUserQuestion (2026-06-07): (1) path = RE-CONFIRM then close; (2) deploy = on the current token, drop the SS_VERCEL_TOKEN rotation #needs-human nag (throwaway test account); (3) ratify ADR-033 at c159 (operator override of the SO #14 phase-exit default); (4) get-started node-onboarding seam = its own content cycle (c159 does NOT touch it).

iii_7step.measure: git pull up-to-date (HEAD 68120fb/c158); npx astro build 162pp/0err (data byte-identical); gates 83/83; preview + neutral screenshots of /network + /vaults/graph + /vaults/Harness.aDNA at 1440+375; eyeballed.
iii_7step.reconfirm: Ran a SECOND independent 4-lens Workflow (wf_91a9b7b0-f31; 504,190 subagent tokens; 207s) blind on the post-fix surfaces. Owning-lens authoritative: node_clarity 3.5 [Newcomer] / edge_honesty 5.0 [Diagram-Rev] / local_shared 4.5 [Node-Op] / navigability 4.0 [IA] / join_scent 4.0 [Node-Op]; mean 4.2; ONE item below floor = node_clarity 3.5. The re-confirm BROKE the c158 self-rescore (which had node_clarity 4.5): the c158 bridge fix landed on /network + /vaults/graph but MISSED the vault-detail relationship block (the deepest, most search-landable surface), which still opened cold with raw 'federation'/'supersedes' jargon and no node definition. Independence earned its keep a THIRD time (after c155 + c158). Also probed a Newcomer 'light mode' finding on vault-detail -> CONFIRMED SCREENSHOT ARTIFACT (Playwright fullPage white-backdrop): getComputedStyle(body)=rgb(26,27,38) + a viewport capture both show dark-first; the live page is dark. NOT a bug.
iii_7step.select_iterate: Cheap fixes for the one below-floor item (+ a cross-lens navigability nit), per the owning lens's exact prescription; heavier items carried. (1) VaultRelationshipBlock.astro — node-clarity bridge line ('This vault is one of many that can live on a single aDNA computer — a node is a Home.aDNA plus the vaults that live on it') + /network escape-hatch link + edge-type gloss (title tooltips reusing the graph legend meanings) + a 'hover a relationship type for what it means' hint. (2) graph.astro + [slug].astro — breadcrumb double-left-arrow ('<- The Lattice  <- Network') disambiguated to parallel parents ('<- The Lattice  ·  Network') so it stops mis-reading as one hierarchy (IA + Newcomer + Diagram-Rev).
iii_7step.implement: 3 files: VaultRelationshipBlock.astro (bridge + gloss + hint + .rel-intro/.rel-key styles), graph.astro (breadcrumb .crumb-sep), [slug].astro (breadcrumb .crumb-sep). Generator/.mmd/vaults.json UNTOUCHED.
iii_7step.re_measure_recheck: Rebuild 162pp/0err (data byte-identical); gates 83/83; re-screenshot + a viewport dark capture confirming the vault-detail is dark + the bridge/gloss/breadcrumb render. TARGETED independent re-check: a single Newcomer-lens agent (owning lens for node_clarity; 111,822 tokens) re-scored the fixed surfaces -> node_clarity 4.4, no remaining below-floor item, verdict 'the owned failure is genuinely fixed, not papered over.' Proportionate close-verification (full fan-out to find, single owning-lens to confirm the fix).
iii_7step.lighthouse: Full decadal sweep (desktop preset): / 100/96/100/100 (A11y 96 = pre-existing mobile target-size) · /network 100 · /vaults/graph 100 · vault 100 · concept 100 · tutorial 100.
iii_7step.deploy: VERCEL_TOKEN env-var (no --token= flag; output redacted) vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --yes -> READY, target production, dpl_Hirdyr5LymjKQ3stzYRx1kc6KpaA. Live-verified adna.network: / + /network + /vaults/graph + /vaults/Harness.aDNA all HTTP 200; helix homepage hero (hero_adna_helix.avif) live; 'The Lattice' nav entry live (desktop + mobile); node-color legend live; node-clarity bridge + parallel breadcrumb live; previously-blank concept Mermaid diagrams now ship the render path (c154 fix goes live).
iii_7step.record: this JSON + e4_c159_reconfirm_lens_results.json (raw re-confirm + re-check) + ADR-033 + the E4 decadal AAR + mission close + STATE/campaign cascade + session SITREP

network_legibility_close.baseline_note: GREEN: no item < 4; mean 4.38 >= the E-series decadal baseline (E1 full-30 4.29). navigability held at the IA authoritative 4.0 (the c159 breadcrumb fix is a minor lift; the major mobile-graph + nav-label-overlap items are carried).

change_summary: site/src/components/sections/VaultRelationshipBlock.astro — node-clarity bridge ('a node is a Home.aDNA plus the vaults that live on it') + '/network' escape hatch + a TYPE_MEANING gloss (title tooltips, meanings mirrored from graph.astro's legend) + a 'hover a relationship type for what it means' hint + .rel-intro/.rel-key styles. Closes the c159 re-confirm's one below-floor item (node_clarity 3.5 -> 4.4) on the deepest, most search-landable surface.

site/src/pages/vaults/graph.astro + site/src/pages/vaults/[slug].astro — breadcrumb double-left-arrow disambiguated: '<- The Lattice' (one up-arrow to the registry) + a '·' separator + 'Network' (parallel narrative parent), with .crumb-sep styling, so the two co-equal parents stop reading as one ascending hierarchy (IA + Newcomer + Diagram-Rev).

notes: The decadal close did exactly what a confirming close should: the operator-chosen RE-CONFIRM (a second independent 4-lens Workflow) broke the c158 self-rescore a third time — node_clarity was still 3.5 because the c158 bridge fix had missed the vault-detail surface — and the cheap, owning-lens-prescribed fix (bridge + gloss + breadcrumb) plus a targeted Newcomer re-check closed it to 4.4 / GREEN before shipping. E4 closes GREEN (mean 4.38, no item < 4), edge_honesty a clean 5.0, and the whole network surface + the homepage helix hero deployed live to adna.network. ADR-033 ratified (operator override). Generator/data byte-identical end-to-end; zero invariant violations. The arc's lesson: score the SEAMS between surfaces, not just the surfaces — every below-floor find across c155/c158/c159 was a between-surface gap an independent cross-surface lens caught and self-scoring missed.
